page.title: Prometheus datasources
page.subtitle: Manage Prometheus metric sources used when AI explains alerts

empty.title: No Prometheus datasource configured yet
empty.subtitle: Add the first one to start wiring alert metrics

isDefault.label: Set as default
isDefault.help: Automatically bound to newly-created Connections. Only one default is allowed.

delete.title: Delete datasource {{name}}?
delete.body: Will detach {{count}} connection(s); their binding is cleared (the connections themselves are not deleted).

errors.nameTaken: Datasource name already taken, try another
errors.baseUrlTaken: This Prometheus URL is already registered, try a different one or edit the existing datasource

settings.title: Prometheus datasources
settings.desc: Manage metric sources used when AI explains alerts. The default datasource is auto-bound to newly-created Connections.
